languages.text: Эта конструкция собирает влагу из растений, которая позднее стекает в бак.
This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.
languages.original_text: Эта конструкция собирает влагу из растений, которая позднее стекает в бак.

traits.locale_text: This structure collects rain and dew, which later drains into the tank.
This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.
It seems this construction is supposed to collect rain and dew, which then drains into the tank.
This structure collects rain and dew, which later drains into the tank.
This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.

languages.text: この構造は雨や露を集め、それをタンクに流すように作られているようです。
languages.original_text: It seems this construction is supposed to collect rain and dew, which then drains into the tank.

traits.locale_text: この構造は雨や露を集め、それをタンクに流すように作られているようです。

languages.text: 这个装置能收集植物里的水分，再汇入储水槽中。
languages.original_text: This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.

traits.locale_text: 这个装置能收集植物里的水分，再汇入储水槽中。

languages.text: Bu yapı, bitkilerden nem topluyor. Bu nem daha sonra tanka boşalıyor.
languages.original_text: This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.

traits.locale_text: Bu yapı, bitkilerden nem topluyor. Bu nem daha sonra tanka boşalıyor.

languages.text: Cette structure recueille l'humidité des plantes, qui s'écoule ensuite dans le réservoir.
languages.original_text: This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.

traits.locale_text: Cette structure recueille l'humidité des plantes, qui s'écoule ensuite dans le réservoir.

languages.text: Esta estructura recoge humedad de las plantas para luego enviarla al tanque.
languages.original_text: This structure collects moisture from plants, which later drains into the tank.

traits.locale_text: Esta estructura recoge humedad de las plantas para luego enviarla al tanque.

languages.text: Diese Struktur enthält Feuchtigkeit von Pflanzen, die in den Tank geleitet wird.
